title: Team Assemblers
description: Work as part of a team having responsibility for assembling an entire product or component of a product. Team assemblers can perform all tasks conducted by the team in the assembly process and rotate through all or most of them, rather than being assigned to a specific task on a permanent basis. May participate in making management decisions affecting the work. Includes team leaders who work as part of the team.

tasks.text: Perform quality checks on products and parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review work orders and blueprints to ensure work is performed according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rotate through all the tasks required in a particular production process.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise assemblers and train employees on job procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Shovel, sweep, or otherwise clean work areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance in the production of wiring assemblies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete production reports to communicate team production level to management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Package finished products and prepare them for shipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate machinery and heavy equipment, such as forklifts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
